name: Almond-Topped Pear Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch and salt.
3. Add butter or margarine, lemon rind, ginger, syrup, and lemon juice to a large bowl. Stir until well combined.
4. Peel, core, and slice the pears. Place them in the pie shell.
5. Pour the pear mixture into the shell.
6. Sprinkle cornstarch mixture over the pears.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Turn off the oven when done and let cool on a wire rack.
